title: Academic Figures MCP Workflow
goal: Create a clear process flowchart that shows how the product moves from an input request to a publication-grade figure: input, plan, prompt or payload assembly, generate, evaluate, iterate, output.
visual_direction: structured, readable, process-centric, modern technical flowchart

source_context.summary: Input -> Plan -> Payload -> Generate -> Evaluate -> Iterate -> Output

must_include: seven large readable process nodes: Input, Plan, Payload, Generate, Evaluate, Iterate, Output
directional arrows showing forward movement through the pipeline
a feedback loop from Evaluate or Iterate back toward Generate or Plan
visual cues for academic rigor such as paper cards, rubric, and polished figure cards
simple clean layout suitable for documentation
references: Use short English node labels to maximize legibility
Prefer a top-down or left-to-right flow with one explicit feedback loop

prompt_pack.prompt:
## Block 1: TITLE & PURPOSE
title: 'Academic Figures MCP Workflow'
purpose: Create a process flowchart showing the end-to-end workflow of Academic Figures MCP from initial scientific input to publication-grade output.

## Block 2: LAYOUT
asset_kind: workflow_flowchart
figure_type: flowchart
composition: A clean left-to-right or top-to-bottom process diagram with seven large process nodes and one obvious feedback loop.

## Block 3: ELEMENTS
repo: academic-figures-mcp
must_include: Input; Plan; Payload; Generate; Evaluate; Iterate; Output
references: show a feedback loop from Evaluate and Iterate back into the workflow; include subtle academic motifs like a paper card, rubric card, and polished figure card

## Block 4: COLOR
palette: academic navy base, teal process arrows, amber emphasis for Generate and Output, warm ivory process cards
style_preset: repo_workflow_flowchart
visual_direction: process clarity first, compact but spacious, premium technical diagram

## Block 5: TEXT
language: English
text_usage: only the short process labels above; keep text large and legible

## Block 6: STYLE
style: clean vector-like flowchart, bold simple shapes, excellent readability, documentation-ready
negative_constraints: avoid clutter, avoid dense explanatory paragraphs, avoid handwritten sketch style, avoid tiny labels

## Block 7: SIZE
canvas: 1536x1024
